# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

.script_execution_base:
  before_script:
    - |
      # Validate script paths to prevent directory traversal
      validate_script_path() {
        local script_path="$1"
        local canonical_path=$(readlink -f "$script_path" 2>/dev/null || realpath "$script_path" 2>/dev/null || echo "$script_path")
        local repo_root=$(readlink -f "$CI_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || realpath "$CI_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || echo "$CI_PROJECT_DIR")
        
        if [[ ! "$canonical_path" == "$repo_root"* ]]; then
          echo "ERROR: Script path outside repository: $script_path"
          exit 1
        fi
        
        if [[ "$script_path" =~ \.\. ]] || [[ "$script_path" =~ ^/ ]]; then
          echo "ERROR: Invalid script path pattern: $script_path"
          exit 1
        fi
        
        if [ ! -f "$script_path" ]; then
          echo "ERROR: Script file not found: $script_path"
          exit 1
        fi
        
        echo "$canonical_path"
      }
      
      # Sanitize environment variables
      sanitize_env() {
        unset $(env | grep -E '^(BASH_FUNC_|SHELLOPTS|PS4|PROMPT_COMMAND)' | cut -d= -f1)
        export PATH="/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"
        export IFS=$' \t\n'
        set +o history
      }
      
      # Execute script with security controls
      secure_execute() {
        local script_path="$1"
        shift
        local args=("$@")
        
        local validated_path=$(validate_script_path "$script_path")
        
        if [ ! -r "$validated_path" ]; then
          echo "ERROR: Script not readable: $script_path"
          exit 1
        fi
        
        local file_type=$(file -b --mime-type "$validated_path")
        if [[ ! "$file_type" =~ ^(text/|application/x-sh|application/x-shellscript) ]]; then
          echo "ERROR: Invalid script file type: $file_type"
          exit 1
        fi
        
        if grep -qE '(\$\(.*curl|\$\(.*wget|eval.*\$|base64.*-d.*\||nc.*-e)' "$validated_path"; then
          echo "WARNING: Potentially dangerous commands detected in script"
        fi
        
        chmod +x "$validated_path"
        
        if [[ "$validated_path" == *.sh ]]; then
          bash -euo pipefail "$validated_path" "${args[@]}"
        elif [[ "$validated_path" == *.py ]]; then
          python3 "$validated_path" "${args[@]}"
        elif [[ "$validated_path" == *.js ]]; then
          node "$validated_path" "${args[@]}"
        else
          "$validated_path" "${args[@]}"
        fi
      }
      
      sanitize_env

variables:
  SECURE_FILES_DOWNLOAD_PATH: "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.secure_files"
  SCRIPT_TIMEOUT: "3600"
  MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE: "10485760"
  ALLOWED_SCRIPT_EXTENSIONS: "sh,py,js,rb,pl"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

validate_scripts:
  stage: validate
  tags:
    - shared
  script:
    - |
      echo "Validating build scripts..."
      
      if [ ! -d "scripts" ]; then
        echo "No scripts directory found, skipping validation"
        exit 0
      fi
      
      find scripts -type f | while read -r script; do
        if [ -f "$script" ]; then
          size=$(stat -f%z "$script" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "$script" 2>/dev/null)
          if [ "$size" -gt "$MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Script too large: $script ($size bytes)"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          ext="${script##*.}"
          if [[ ! ",$ALLOWED_SCRIPT_EXTENSIONS," =~ ",$ext," ]] && [ "$ext" != "$script" ]; then
            echo "WARNING: Unusual script extension: $script"
          fi
          
          if [ -x "$script" ]; then
            echo "Validated: $script"
          fi
        fi
      done
      
      echo "Script validation complete"
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

.custom_build_template:
  extends: .script_execution_base
  tags:
    - shared
  timeout: 1h
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 1 week
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
  cache:
    key: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}
    paths:
      - .cache/
      - node_modules/
      - vendor/
  retry:
    max: 2
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure

build:custom:
  extends: .custom_build_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      echo "Starting custom build process..."
      
      if [ -n "${CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        echo "Using custom build script: $CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT"
        secure_execute "$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT" ${CUSTOM_BUILD_ARGS:-}
      elif [ -f "scripts/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Using default build script"
        secure_execute "scripts/build.sh"
      else
        echo "ERROR: No build script specified or found"
        exit 1
      fi
      
      if [ -d "build" ] || [ -d "dist" ]; then
        echo "BUILD_SUCCESS=true" >> build.env
        echo "BUILD_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> build.env
      else
        echo "WARNING: No build output detected"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

test:unit:
  extends: .custom_build_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      echo "Running unit tests..."
      
      if [ -n "${CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        secure_execute "$CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT" ${CUSTOM_TEST_ARGS:-}
      elif [ -f "scripts/test.sh" ]; then
        secure_execute "scripts/test.sh"
      else
        echo "No test script found, skipping tests"
        exit 0
      fi
  coverage: '/COVERAGE:\s+(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%/'
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: test-results/*.xml
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura.xml
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

test:integration:
  extends: .custom_build_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      echo "Running integration tests..."
      
      if [ -n "${CUSTOM_INTEGRATION_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        secure_execute "$CUSTOM_INTEGRATION_SCRIPT" ${CUSTOM_INTEGRATION_ARGS:-}
      elif [ -f "scripts/integration-test.sh" ]; then
        secure_execute "scripts/integration-test.sh"
      else
        echo "No integration test script found, skipping"
        exit 0
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

security:scan:
  stage: test
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - echo "Preparing security scan..."
  script:
    - |
      echo "Running security checks..."
      
      if command -v trivy &> /dev/null; then
        trivy fs --exit-code 0 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL .
      fi
      
      if [ -f "scripts/security-scan.sh" ]; then
        bash -euo pipefail scripts/security-scan.sh
      fi
      
      find . -type f -name "*.sh" -exec shellcheck {} + || true
      
      echo "Security scan complete"
  allow_failure: true
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

package:artifacts:
  extends: .custom_build_template
  stage: package
  script:
    - |
      echo "Packaging artifacts..."
      
      mkdir -p artifacts
      
      if [ -n "${CUSTOM_PACKAGE_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        secure_execute "$CUSTOM_PACKAGE_SCRIPT" ${CUSTOM_PACKAGE_ARGS:-}
      elif [ -f "scripts/package.sh" ]; then
        secure_execute "scripts/package.sh"
      else
        if [ -d "build" ]; then
          tar -czf "artifacts/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz" build/
        fi
        if [ -d "dist" ]; then
          tar -czf "artifacts/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-dist-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz" dist/
        fi
      fi
      
      if [ -d "artifacts" ] && [ "$(ls -A artifacts)" ]; then
        echo "PACKAGE_SUCCESS=true" >> build.env
        ls -lh artifacts/
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 30 days
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

deploy:staging:
  extends: .custom_build_template
  stage: deploy
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    on_stop: stop:staging
  script:
    - |
      echo "Deploying to staging..."
      
      if [ -z "${DEPLOY_STAGING_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: DEPLOY_STAGING_SCRIPT variable not set"
        exit 1
      fi
      
      secure_execute "$DEPLOY_STAGING_SCRIPT" ${DEPLOY_STAGING_ARGS:-}
      
      echo "Deployment to staging complete"
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
  needs:
    - job: build:custom
    - job: test:unit
    - job: package:artifacts

stop:staging:
  extends: .script_execution_base
  stage: deploy
  tags:
    - shared
  environment:
    name: staging
    action: stop
  script:
    - |
      echo "Stopping staging environment..."
      
      if [ -n "${STOP_STAGING_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        secure_execute "$STOP_STAGING_SCRIPT"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual

deploy:production:
  extends: .custom_build_template
  stage: deploy
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  script:
    - |
      echo "Deploying to production..."
      
      if [ -z "${DEPLOY_PRODUCTION_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: DEPLOY_PRODUCTION_SCRIPT variable not set"
        exit 1
      fi
      
      if [ ! -f "$DEPLOY_PRODUCTION_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Production deployment script not found"
        exit 1
      fi
      
      secure_execute "$DEPLOY_PRODUCTION_SCRIPT" ${DEPLOY_PRODUCTION_ARGS:-}
      
      echo "Deployment to production complete"
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$/'
      when: manual
  needs:
    - job: build:custom
    - job: test:unit
    - job: test:integration
    - job: package:artifacts

cleanup:
  stage: .post
  tags:
    - shared
  script:
    - |
      echo "Cleaning up temporary files..."
      rm -rf .cache/tmp
      rm -rf "$SECURE_FILES_DOWNLOAD_PATH"
      echo "Cleanup complete"
  when: always
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
